ab: myasa ci lpyung mu ga Yukan, heya ga la’i Tayan uyi.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Yukan，他也是泰雅族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Yukan, and he is also an Tayal child.

ab: ms’un cami m’was biru beh alang Pyahaw.
ch: 我們一起在碧候部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Pyahaw. tribe.

ab: ms’un cami mung bkis kmayan yaw lela, kba cami calay kmayan ke Tayan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說泰雅語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Tayal proficiently.

ab: bawi caku ci ru thuy caku ci, Yukan ga, creh ci ru mhekang ci.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Yukan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Yukan is short and thin.

ab: Yukan ga shelaw calay, sli naha ci kwara.
ch: Yukan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Yukan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
